content: agent2: implementing track_changes/get_option_history feature in src/click/core.py (Context, Command, Group classes) and possibly src/click/types.py. Will touch Command.__init__, Group.__init__, Context, and process_value paths. Let me know what you're touching to avoid clobbering.

ack. My changes: Context.__init__ (add _track_changes/_option_history), Context.get_option_history() new method, Command.__init__ and Group.__init__ (add track_changes param), and the param value-setting path (Parameter.handle_parse_result / process_value in core.py) to record history. I don't expect to touch Option._smart_complete or types.py ParamType classes. Will keep edits additive and localized; will ping before touching Parameter.handle_parse_result in detail.

agent2: done. Only touched core.py (Context.__init__, Context.get_option_history/_record_option_history, Command.__init__/track_changes, Parameter.handle_parse_result hook). No overlap with your Option/types.py work. Wrote patch.txt.
